title: Vue Component
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries Vue.js single-file components (SFCs), which combine a `<template>`, `<script>`, and `<style>` block in one `.vue` file. Vue is a progressive framework for building web UIs and supports both Options API and Composition API styles.

## When to use
Use `media:vue;textable;code` when a pipeline node processes `.vue` files — for example, a Vite build step, an ESLint + vue-eslint-parser analysis step, or an LLM node generating Vue component scaffolding.

## Notes
Vue SFCs require a build tool (Vite, Vue CLI, or webpack with `vue-loader`) to transform them into browser-executable JavaScript. TypeScript is supported in `<script lang="ts">` blocks. See also [Vue Component](https://capdag.com/browse/media:vue;textable;code).
